CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Continued To Feb-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action. (Filed At Insistence Of Litigant)
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
John J. Hughes, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Yu Yi Wei, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Zhi-Heng Wei present in court.
Mark Williams, Esq. counsel for defendant Wallin's Dive Center, Inc appears by court call.
Melissa Leos, Esq. counsel for defendant Wallin's Dive Center appears by court call.
Russell Brown, Esq. counsel for defendant Truth Aquatic appears by court call.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
Crisostomo Ibarra, Esq. present and interprets English to Manadarin/Manadarin to English on behalf of the petitioner.
After discussions with counsel regarding the petitioner being the gaurdian ad litem fro the named minor based on martime law, the court accepts that in this matter the petitioner can act/appear as guardina ad litem for the minor child.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $16,200.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,018.89 payable to the law offices of John J. Hughes.
Reimbursement for medical and all othe expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $4,124.46.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment $7,143.35.

A net balance of $9,056.65 to be deposited into a Wells Fargo Bank account. Account number on file.

Judge Dorfman orders that within 48 hours of receiving funds, the petitioner is to deposit funds into the Wells Fargo account.

Matter continued to January 6, 2015 at for proof of deposit of funds. No appearance if proof is received prior to the scheduled date.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ADAM HACKETT, ESQ., 562.983.2582, FOR DEFENDANT WALLIN'S DIVE CENTER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WALLIN'S DIVE CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Denied as moot in light of the ruling on demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ADAM HACKETT, ESQ., 562.983.2582, FOR DEFENDANT WALLIN'S DIVE CENTER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WALLIN'S DIVE CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Sustained with 20 days leave to amend for uncertainty (CCP 420.10(f).) The complaint is ambiguous as to in what capacity the plaintiff is bringing each cause of action (ie: as the representative of the son or of the estate). The complaint does not clearly state what causes of action are brought against which defendants. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332
